title: RTPMod - Random Teleportation
description: Adds a /rtp command for random teleportation.
body:
# 🚀 RTPMod

A lightning-fast **Random Teleport** mod for Fabric that eliminates lagspikes. ⚡
Easily find a safe spot to start your adventure or return to your previous location!

---

### ✨ Features
- 📍 **`/rtp`**: Teleports you to a safe, random location in the world.
- 🔄 **`/rtpback`**: Returns you to your last random teleport position.
- 🌍 **Dimension Support**: Works across different dimensions.
- 🛡️ **Safety Checks**: Ensures you don't land in lava, water, or dangerous spots.

---

### 🎮 Compatibility
- 🤝 **Client and Server**: Optional on client. 
- 🕹️ **Singleplayer**: Works perfectly in your local worlds.
- 🖥️ **Dedicated Server**: Fully optimized for server environments.

---

### ❤️ Credits
This mod was inspired by and uses some assets from [FastRTP](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastrtp) by **Wesley1808**. 
Huge thanks for their amazing work! 🙌
